8.5.26.en: v8.5.26: 122 new fingerprints from community sync. Fixed 2Client crash.  total.

8.5.24.en: v8.5.24: 122 new fingerprints from community sync, crash fix for app initialization, and general stability improvements.

8.5.22.en: v8.5.22: 122 new fingerprints from community sync. New devices: soil sensor (_TZE284_0ints6wl). Bug fixes: auto-off timer, button triple click, overload, and radio presence triggers now work correctly.

8.5.21.en: v8.5.21: . New soil sensor support (_TZE284_0ints6wl). Fixed 39 broken YAML .

8.5.20.en: v8.5.20: . New soil sensor support. Removed stale fingerprints. General stability improvements.

8.5.17.en: v8.5.17: Added support for new soil sensor (_TZE284_0ints6wl / TS0601). Minor improvements and stability enhancements.

8.1.13.en: v8.1.12: Fixed crash in DeviceIdentificationDatabase that could cause app instability during device lookup., Added 298 new fingerprints from Z2M, ZHA, community reports, and JohanBendz contributions., Total: 413 drivers, 3296 fingerprints validated., rain_sensor: capability handling update.

8.1.12.en: v8.1.12 — 298 new fingerprints added, DeviceIdentificationDatabase crash fix, 413 drivers, 3296 FPs validated.

8.1.11.en: Bug fix: air purifier smoke and siren flow cards no longer crash on init. 298 new fingerprints added across drivers.

8.1.10.en: Bug fixes: contact_sensor_curtain, contact_sensor_dimmer, wall_dimmer_1gang_1way validation errors resolved. Duplicate flow card warnings eliminated globally.

8.1.8.en: 298 new device fingerprints added. Smart plug driver fixes, rain sensor, water leak sensor, and open/close sensor updates.

8.1.7.en: 298 new device fingerprints added. Smart plug and water leak sensor fixes. Flow card and fingerprint collision corrections.

8.1.6.en: Fixes for curtain motor, dimmer, and air quality drivers. New fingerprints for christmas_lights, curtain_module_2_gang, and dimmer drivers. Removed outdated configurations.

8.1.5.en: v8.1.5 — 238 new fingerprints, Smart Solar Soil Sensor, Insoma irrigation valve, battery init fix, SOS/BSEED/Avatto WT198 fixes, SmartDivisor math, mainsPowered optimization, 53 FPs validated.

8.1.4.en: . New capabilities: measure_frequency, measure_power_factor, alarm_gas, alarm_siren, alarm_vibration, alarm_water_high, boost_mode. 82 Johan SDK3 fingerprints added. 5 bug fixes. 1208 fingerprints auto-healed.

8.1.3.en: Bug fix: ZY-M100 settings now expose correctly. 41 new flow cards across drivers. WiFi flow cards complete. Updated flow support for climate_sensor, din_rail, garage_door, radiator_valve, and more.

8.1.2.en: bed_sensor driver added. Fixed 3 fingerprint collisions (device_din_rail/EMQMWTYM→doorbell, switch_1gang/TVUARKSA→plug_energy_monitor, button_wireless_smart/MRPEVH8P→button_wireless_1). Fixed curtain_motor_tilt flow cards, valve_irrigation class, bed_sensor settings.

8.1.1.en: v8.1.1: Fixed Issue #331 — Settings tab crash on 6 drivers (Hybrid*Base renamed to Unified*Base). Fixed curtain_motor_tilt missing flow cards (turn_on, turn_off, toggle). Fixed valve_irrigation device class (thermostat→socket). Added bed_sensor driver for _TZE200_seq9cm6u. Added CT Clamp _TZE28C1000000_81yrt3lo to power_clamp_meter. New fingerprints across 8 drivers.

8.5.27.en: v8.5.26: Added 122 new device fingerprints from Z2M, ZHA, and community contributions (JohanBendz), Fixed crash in , Expanded device support to 413 drivers with 7448 total fingerprints, Updated device matrix and project status reports
